title: melia hirsuta
intro: Melia hirsuta, also known as the hairy ash or kumbuk tree, is a deciduous tree native to Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The various health benefits of Melia hirsuta include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Melia hirsuta can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
